  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.filter.converter used by org.springframework.ai.chroma.vectorstore
    Class
    Description
    AbstractFilterExpressionConverter
    AbstractFilterExpressionConverter is an abstract class that implements the FilterExpressionConverter interface.
    PineconeFilterExpressionConverter
    Converts Filter.Expression into Pinecone metadata filter expression format
